decisions.title: Charity fair venue = Phuong Liet Community Center
decisions.summary: After comparing three options in chat, Linh concluded the fair will be at Phuong Liet Community Center: 1.2tr VND/day including tables and chairs, available on the candidate weekends. Penciled in; final date due within 2 weeks.
decisions.rationale: Thanh Xuan Cultural House cost 5tr/day plus deposit; the free school yard had no rain plan and an unreachable principal; Phuong Liet CC was cheap, equipped, and available.

decisions.title: Charity fair venue moved from Phuong Liet community center to Nguyen Du School gym
decisions.summary: Phuong Liet CC's new management doubled the fair-day rent from 1tr2 to 2tr4 and voided the old quote (w26-034), and the main hall AC is broken with no fix before end of August (w26-037). After khoa suggested the school gym, linh chot the move in w26-044: gym is free at community-partner rate, working ceiling fans, indoor rain plan, plus yard space for extra stalls. Supersedes the earlier community-center decision (D1). Paperwork signed next day (w26-059).
decisions.rationale: Doubled rental fee (1tr2 -> 2tr4) plus broken AC in August heat vs a free gym with working fans, indoor rain cover, and yard space; existing school relationship via weekend classes

decisions.title: Weekly classes locked to Saturday 09:00
decisions.summary: Education team fixed the recurring class slot: every Saturday at 09:00, starting week of 2026-06-08. Mai announced it with the !decision marker after an availability poll; parents notified via Zalo.
decisions.rationale: Families prefer Saturday morning (drop-off on the way to weekend jobs) and volunteer availability is highest then; Sunday is family day for several kids.

decisions.title: Weekend classes move to Sunday 14:00 (supersedes D3)
decisions.summary: mai concluded that weekend classes move from Saturday to Sunday 14:00 starting Jul 5, same rooms. Supersedes the earlier Saturday-schedule decision (D3).
decisions.rationale: School needs the Saturday rooms for grade-9 exam prep until end of August, and khoa's volunteer sheet shows more volunteers are free on Sundays than Saturdays

decisions.title: Fair donations via VietQR bank transfer, not Momo
decisions.summary: After a Momo-vs-bank-transfer debate, phuong concludes: VietQR bank transfer on the club account, Momo only as fallback for people who cannot transfer.
decisions.rationale: Traceability for the finance report — every donation lands in one club account with sender name and note attached; Momo would sit on a personal wallet with painful statement exports (last year's reconciliation was a nightmare).

decisions.title: Fair t-shirts: InTheXanh, 120 shirts, navy
decisions.summary: After comparing quotes (InTheXanh 78k/shirt vs Áo Xưởng 71k with thinner fabric), minh locked the fair t-shirt order: vendor InTheXanh, 120 shirts, navy, ~9.4tr total, delivery 2 weeks before fair day.
decisions.rationale: Better fabric quality justifies the 7k/shirt premium; last year's cheap shirts faded after 2 washes; navy suits the design

decisions.title: Buddy system for new volunteers
decisions.summary: mai makes it a rule: every new volunteer is paired with an experienced mentor for their first 2 sessions — shadow first, then co-teach; khoa assigns the pairs on signup.
decisions.rationale: A recent new volunteer was left standing alone with no onboarding; pairing prevents that and gets newcomers teaching faster.

decisions.title: Fair entry is FREE with donation box at the gate
decisions.summary: linh posts !decision: fair entry will be free with a donation box at the gate, explicitly replacing the earlier 20k ticket plan. Comms immediately repurposes messaging around FREE ENTRY (w28-045/046) and huong preps donation-count procedures (w28-047).
decisions.rationale: Higher attendance, removes ticket-selling/checking overhead, and donations typically match or exceed ticket revenue

blockers.title: Sound-system rental vendor not replying (first passing mention)
blockers.waiting_on: Sound rental vendor's reply to the quote request sent 2026-06-18 (w25-072)

blockers.title: No access to NPO bank statements — e-banking handover pending from former treasurer
blockers.waiting_on: chi Yen (former treasurer) to hand over e-banking access

blockers.title: Classroom projector dead; school IT says replacement 'next month, maybe'
blockers.waiting_on: school IT projector replacement (or a borrowed projector)

blockers.title: T-shirt printing delayed by InTheXanh, no ETA
blockers.waiting_on: new ETA from InTheXanh print shop

blockers.title: No admin access to AIV Facebook page
blockers.waiting_on: chi Yen (rotated-out former treasurer, now in Da Nang) to restore page admin access; huong is reaching out via Zalo, no reply yet

statuses.summary: Sponsor letter with 3-tier sponsorship table ready (locks once fair date is set); followers passed 800; Friday post published via An's personal account. Open issue: no Facebook page admin access, chasing chi Yen, unresolved.
Schedule locked to Saturdays 09:00 and parents notified; first 9am class ran with 22 kids and 6 volunteers (Python turtle graphics + Scratch maze with power-ups); next Saturday Tuan teaches loops.

Venue settled (Phuong Liet Community Center, 1tr2/day incl tables+chairs, penciled for two candidate weekends, date due within 2 weeks); 2 free speakers plus van transport secured by Duc; poster v1 in progress by Minh. Next week: pick fair date and draft budget.

phuong's informal wrap: FB admin access recovered, donation method locked (VietQR bank transfer), standee in design, 5 sponsor decks out, bakery tentatively interested; next week FB event page + boost volunteer post.
mai's informal wrap: Scratch class ran great, 2 new volunteers onboarded via buddy system, worksheets sorted; next Saturday is Python with tuan back.

linh's !status wrap: venue contract signed + deposit paid (cleanup deposit capped), booth map v1 done (12 booths, sponsors row A), stage measured 6x4m with 2.8m beam noted, t-shirt design locked with quote in hand; next week sound & lighting quotes, vendor confirmations, shirt order size.

Sponsor deck out to 5 companies (1 lukewarm reply, huong chasing); venue-change post performing well; poster v2 locked; finance still stuck behind the chi Yen e-banking handover going into Sunday's all-hands.

19 kids at Saturday class (2 new); Scratch group started pet simulator; Python did the variables quiz (avg 7/10 despite no projector); 2 new uni tutors onboarded. Projector still broken — same setup next week unless one turns up; mai raising it at the all-hands.
Venue = Nguyen Du gym, signed; 14 committed stalls + 3 new inquiries; volunteers 26/30; stall map v2 done; t-shirt and poster final. Open items: sound quote, banner printing quote.

T-shirts decided (InTheXanh, 120 navy); e-banking access recovered from chi Yen so payments unblocked; venue + stage deposits paid; budget at ~82% of the all-hands cap. Next week: sponsor pack v2 + big fair announcement post.
Classes officially move to Sunday 14:00 starting Jul 5; parents informed; volunteer schedule updated; teachers to arrive 13:30 for setup.
Stage contract signed (5tr incl backup mics), venue layout v2 done, 44/50 volunteers. Next week: stall assignments + open questions.

3 of 4 sponsor payments received (TechViet cleared), So Do Cafe promises to sign Monday, teaser #2 hit 200+ likes — a page record — and next week's content continues the free-entry angle. Natural unmarked status.
Both weekend classes fully scheduled, 3 new Scratch slots filled, loops part-2 worksheet ready, kids' fair-demo plan to be finalized after Sunday's meeting. Natural unmarked status.

Truss and genset booked, cable plan v1 done, sound supplier STILL not locked (plan B being prepared), t-shirts stuck waiting on InTheXanh ETA, entry decided as free + donation box; 23 days to the fair. Natural unmarked status.

transcript_records.title: Fair date locked: Saturday 2026-08-02
transcript_records.summary: After back-and-forth about a rain-season backup (Aug 16 option rejected: not drier, collides with the mid-August class showcase, and the Nguyen Du School gym is indoors so rain risk is covered), Linh locks the charity fair date for Saturday August 2nd, 2026.

transcript_records.title: Fair budget cap: 25,000,000 VND
transcript_records.summary: Phuong relays Huong's line-item budget (stage/sound 8M, tents/tables 4.5M, banners/printing 3M, prizes/kids' materials 4M, volunteer food 2.5M, contingency 3M = 25M flat); Linh confirms the cap at 25 million VND, with any overrun requiring her sign-off and prizes cut first.

transcript_records.title: District event permit still pending
transcript_records.summary: Permit application submitted two weeks ago; Linh called the ward office twice with no response. Flagged as the biggest open risk (no fair without it); public date announcement held to teasers until it clears. Action item left open: Linh goes in person Tuesday and keeps chasing.
transcript_records.waiting_on: ward office / district response to the event permit application

distractors.note: Volunteer signup scare (self-resolved, not a blocker)
20k VND entry ticket idea floated — no conclusion
Parking fee at the fair — postponed, never revisited
Snack sponsor feature vote postponed, no conclusion

qa_questions.q: Why did we switch venues for the fair?
qa_questions.expected_answer_gist: The fair moved from Phuong Liet Community Center to the Nguyen Du School gym on 2026-06-24 because the community center doubled its rental fee (1tr2 -> 2tr4) and its AC is broken, while the gym is free at community-partner rate with fans and an indoor rain plan. The original community-center decision is superseded.

qa_questions.q: Why did the weekend classes move to Sunday afternoon?
qa_questions.expected_answer_gist: Classes moved from Saturday 09:00 to Sunday 14:00 (from Jul 5) because the school needs the Saturday rooms for grade-9 exam prep until end of August and more volunteers are free on Sundays. Supersedes the original Saturday-morning decision.

qa_questions.q: How do people donate to AIV, and why that method?
qa_questions.expected_answer_gist: Donations go through VietQR bank transfer on the club account (Momo only as a fallback) — chosen for traceability: every donation lands in one account with sender name and note, which makes the finance report reconciliation clean.
